security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'
